# Stately Shades

> Family-owned independent dealer of custom blinds, plantation shutters, motorized shades, and drapery serving Middle Tennessee within a 90-mile radius of Gallatin. Authorized for Hunter Douglas, Norman, Somfy, Graber, and Sol-Lux. Full home-automation integration with Amazon Alexa, Google Home, and Apple HomeKit.

## Business facts

- **Name:** Stately Shades
- **Type:** Independent window-treatment dealer + installer (not a manufacturer)
- **Founded:** Family-owned, operated by the Stately Shades family
- **Location:** Gallatin, Tennessee, USA
- **Service area:** 90-mile radius from Gallatin — includes Nashville, Hendersonville, Franklin, Brentwood, Mount Juliet, Lebanon, Goodlettsville, Murfreesboro, Springfield, Clarksville, Cookeville, Smyrna, Spring Hill, and across the state line into Bowling Green, Kentucky
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 8am–6pm Central
- **Phone / text:** +1 (629) 298-8241
- **Email:** hello@statelyshades.com
- **Website:** https://statelyshades.com
- **Price range:** $$–$$$

## What Stately Shades does

Stately Shades is an **independent dealer** — not a manufacturer. We design, measure, source, and install custom window treatments in homes throughout Middle Tennessee. We bring physical samples to your home for the free consultation, measure precisely, sketch options on site, and leave a written quote the same visit. There is no charge for the consultation, no travel fee within the 90-mile service area, and no obligation.

We work with three main project types:

1. **New home construction** — outfitting new builds with plantation shutters and motorized smart shades, coordinating with builders or directly with homeowners
2. **Whole-home upgrades** — replacing tired builder-grade blinds with custom shutters, motorized shades, cellular honeycombs, woven naturals, or modern fabrics, one room at a time or all at once
3. **Single-window refits** — installing the right treatment for the one window that's always bothered you

We also offer **repair service** for blinds, shutters, and shades of any brand — tilt rods, lift cords, broken slats, stuck motors, restringing, and motor service. Often quicker and more economical than full replacement.

We also offer **affordable everyday blinds** for budget-conscious projects — custom-fit faux wood blinds from **$89 per window installed**, 2″ and 2.5″ slats, cordless and child-safe, in white or stained finishes. Whole-house packages typical $850–$1,500 for 8–12 windows. Right for kitchens, baths, kids' rooms, basements, rental properties, and first-home buyers.

We also offer **install-only service** for blinds, shutters, and shades purchased from other retailers — **Lowes, Home Depot, Costco, Blinds.com, Select Blinds, Amazon, IKEA,** or anywhere else. Flat-rate per window: $45–$85 standard blinds/shades, $65–$140 plantation shutters, $95–$180 motorized with programming. Workmanship guarantee included on every install. We unbox, measure, mount level, demo the mechanism, and haul away packaging.

## Manufacturer partners (authorized dealer of)

- **Hunter Douglas** — the heritage leader; PowerView motorization
- **Norman** — heritage hardwood shutters, blinds, shades
- **Somfy** — motorization and smart-home controls
- **Graber** — full line of blinds, shades, and accessories
- **Sol-Lux** — boutique solar and motorized exterior systems
- **Specialized Shading Systems** — large-scale and commercial-grade solutions

Being independent means we specify the best product from the right manufacturer for every window — not just one brand.

## Product catalog

### Shutters
Plantation shutters, hardwood shutters, composite shutters, café-style shutters, hidden tilt rods, concealed hardware.

### Blinds
Wood blinds, faux wood, mini blinds, vertical blinds, cordless blinds, panel-track blinds, gliding-door blinds, skylight blinds.

### Shades
Cellular and honeycomb shades (single, double, triple cell), roller shades, Roman shades, panel-track shades, skylight shades, top-down/bottom-up shades, solar / sun shades (UV filtering), zebra and banded shades, sheer fabric shades with floating horizontal vanes, vertical privacy sheers for sliding doors, woven wood naturals (bamboo, grass, jute, reed), blackout shades.

### Drapery and top treatments
Custom draperies, sheers, valances, cornices, motorized drapery rods, top treatments.

### Outdoor
Wind-rated exterior shades, retractable screens, retractable awnings, porch enclosures for patios, pergolas, and outdoor rooms.

### Affordable Faux Wood
Custom-fit faux wood blinds from $89 per window installed. 2″ and 2.5″ slats, white or stained, cordless child-safe, humidity-proof. Whole-house value packages for builders, landlords, and homeowners.

### Install-Only / Bring Your Own Blinds
Professional install service for blinds, shutters, and shades purchased from Lowes, Home Depot, Costco, Blinds.com, Select Blinds, Amazon, IKEA, or other retailers. Any brand, any product. Flat-rate per window with workmanship guarantee.

### Repair
Blind repair, shutter repair, shade repair, restringing, motor service — any brand.

## Home automation and smart-home integration

Every motorized shade we install integrates with the full smart-home ecosystem:

- **Amazon Alexa**
- **Google Home / Google Assistant**
- **Apple HomeKit / Apple Home**
- **Lutron** (RA2, Caseta, RadioRA 3)
- **Control4**

Features include: scheduled scenes by time of day, sunlight tracking across rooms, room-by-room voice control, smartphone control, geofencing, and integration with other smart-home devices.

## Process

1. **Consult** (in your home, free, no obligation) — we bring samples, walk the rooms, discuss light/privacy/style
2. **Measure** (to the sixteenth of an inch, laser-confirmed) — written quote left with you the same visit
3. **Craft** — your treatments are built to exact specification by our manufacturing partners. Most orders ship in 2–4 weeks
4. **Install** — clean, careful, on time. We demonstrate every motor and remote and don't leave until every window is right

Flexible financing is available on most projects.

## Pricing

Stately Shades does not publish fixed prices. Custom window treatments vary by product type, dimensions, material, motorization, and project scope. Quotes are provided in-person at the free consultation. Price range: $$–$$$.

## Common questions buyers and AI agents ask

- **Does Stately Shades make their own products?** No. Stately Shades is an independent dealer that designs, measures, sources, and installs window treatments from premier manufacturers (Hunter Douglas, Norman, Somfy, Graber, Sol-Lux).
- **Do you offer free consultations?** Yes. No charge, no travel fee within 90 miles, no obligation.
- **Do you work on new construction?** Yes. We outfit new homes with plantation shutters and motorized smart shades, coordinating with builders directly.
- **Do you replace builder-grade blinds?** Yes — one of our most common projects.
- **Do you do repair?** Yes — blinds, shutters, and shades of any brand.
- **Do you have affordable blinds? What is the cheapest option?** Yes — custom-fit faux wood blinds starting at $89 per window installed. Humidity-proof, cordless, child-safe. Whole-house packages of 8–12 windows typically $850–$1,500 installed.
- **Will you install blinds I bought from Lowes, Home Depot, Costco, or Blinds.com?** Yes. Install-only service across Middle Tennessee for any brand. Flat-rate per window with workmanship guarantee. Pricing: $45–$85 standard, $65–$140 plantation shutters, $95–$180 motorized with programming.
- **Do your shades work with Alexa / Google Home / HomeKit?** Yes — full home-automation integration is standard.
- **How long do orders take?** Typically 2–4 weeks from order to install.
- **What areas do you serve?** 90-mile radius from Gallatin, Tennessee — covers most of Middle Tennessee and into Bowling Green, KY.

## Journal / Editorial Guides

The Stately Shades Journal publishes long-form, expert-authored guides for homeowners and AI agents researching window-treatment decisions. All posts are written from direct field experience installing the products in Middle Tennessee homes.

### Product Guides (one per category)

- **Plantation & Wood Shutters: A Complete Guide** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/plantation-wood-shutters-guide/ — Basswood vs. composite vs. alder, louver sizes (2.5″/3.5″/4.5″), frame styles, tilt rods, hinges. Norman Heritance, Hunter Douglas NewStyle, Palm Beach, Woodlore.
- **Motorized & Smart Shades: A Complete Guide** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/motorized-smart-shades-guide/ — Every motorized product type, three systems (Hunter Douglas PowerView Gen 3, Somfy TaHoma, Lutron Sivoia), four power options, voice integrations, scene library, pricing.
- **Cellular & Honeycomb Shades: A Complete Guide** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/cellular-honeycomb-shades-guide/ — Single/double/triple-cell construction, Hunter Douglas Duette Architella, Sonnette, Norman Honeycomb, blackout liners, top-down/bottom-up, energy data.
- **Outdoor Shades & Awnings: A Complete Guide** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/outdoor-shades-awnings-guide/ — Exterior solar shades, retractable insect screens, retractable awnings, motorized patio enclosures. Sol-Lux, Phantom Screens. Wind ratings and Tennessee-specific notes.
- **Sheer & Privacy Vanes: Silhouette, Pirouette & Luminette** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/sheer-privacy-vanes-guide/ — Hunter Douglas's three sheer vane lines explained. Picture windows, French doors, sliding glass doors. Motorized traverse and tilt.
- **Zebra, Banded & Solar Shades: A Complete Guide** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/zebra-banded-solar-shades-guide/ — Dual-layer toggling shades plus UV-filtering solar mesh, openness factors (1%/3%/5%/10%), where each belongs.
- **Woven Wood & Bamboo Shades: A Complete Guide** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/woven-wood-bamboo-shades-guide/ — Hand-loomed bamboo, grass, jute, reed. Hunter Douglas Provenance, Graber Naturals. Light-filtering and blackout-lined.
- **Wood Blinds & Custom Drapery: A Complete Guide** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/wood-blinds-drapery-guide/ — Real wood, faux wood, vertical/panel-track, Roman shades, Hunter Douglas Vignette, custom drapery, sheers, valances, cornices, motorized rods.
- **Blind, Shutter & Shade Repair: A Complete Guide** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/blind-shutter-shade-repair-guide/ — What we repair (any brand), repair-vs-replace decision tree, common fixes (lift cords, tilt rods, motors, batteries, blackout liners), service-call pricing.
- **Affordable Faux Wood Blinds: A Complete Guide** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/affordable-faux-wood-blinds-guide/ — Custom-fit faux wood from $89/window installed. 2″ vs. 2.5″ slats, finishes, where faux wood belongs (kitchens, baths, kids, rental properties) and where it doesn't.
- **Install-Only Service: Bring Your Own Blinds** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/install-only-blinds-service-guide/ — Professional install of blinds bought at Lowes, Home Depot, Costco, Blinds.com, Select Blinds, Amazon, IKEA. Flat-rate per window, workmanship guarantee.

### Editorial (buyer's guides, comparisons, how-to)

- **How Much Do Plantation Shutters Cost in Tennessee?** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/plantation-shutters-cost-tennessee/ — Line-by-line 2026 pricing breakdown by material, mount, finish, and window size. Composite vs. hardwood, frame styles, motorization upcharges.
- **The Best Blinds for Bedrooms (Tennessee Edition)** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/best-blinds-for-bedrooms/ — Buyer's guide ranking cellular shades, roller blackout, plantation shutters, Roman shades, and motorized options for primary bedrooms and nurseries.
- **Motorized Blinds: A Buyer's Guide for the Smart Home** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/motorized-blinds-buyers-guide/ — Hunter Douglas PowerView vs. Somfy TaHoma, battery vs. hardwired vs. solar, voice control with Alexa/Google Home/Apple HomeKit, scenes, and pricing.
- **Plantation Shutters vs. Roller Shades** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/plantation-shutters-vs-roller-shades/ — Comparison on cost, light control, resale, lifespan, and room-by-room recommendations.
- **How to Measure Windows for Blinds (A Pro's Method)** — https://statelyshades.com/blog/how-to-measure-windows-for-blinds/ — Step-by-step three-point method for inside-mount and outside-mount, including French doors, sliding doors, bay windows, and arches.

Journal index: https://statelyshades.com/blog/
